items.title: TNT, Rain or Shine draw first blood in Commissione...
items.summary: TNT Tropang 5G and Rain or Shine Elasto Painters have both started the Commissioner's Cup semis with victories.

items.title: LeBron James shares retirement news amid new Lakers rumors: ‘At some point…’
items.summary: The Lakers star is aware that free agency gives him the power to either stay long-term or explore opportunities with another team.

items.title: Watch Partick Thistle & St Mirren fight out play-off draw
items.summary: Watch the best of the action as Partick Thistle and St Mirren fight out a draw in the first leg of the Scottish Premiership play-off final.
